rules: The winning team in the final.
The losing team in the final.
First to save a penalty outside of a penalty shootout.
Eliminated by a penalty shootout with fewest converted penalties. Prize split between winner and runner-up if there are no penalty shootouts.
Total yellow and red cards. Most yellow cards and fouls committed will decide a tie-break.
Most goals conceded excluding penalty shoot-outs. Fewest games played will decide a tie-break.
Eliminated at the group stage with fewest points. Fewest goals scored and most goals conceded will decide a tie-break.
